text.title: validation-methods Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for validation-methods as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agents will hallucinate search volume numbers if the search API is not provided; always inject real data as context.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLMs are unreliable on numeric data; grounding with real APIs or datasets prevents fabrication.

failure-mode.description: G2 and Trustpilot block automated scraping aggressively — use cached Apify datasets or rate-limit to 1 req/5s.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: IP bans and legal risk; cached datasets are more sustainable.

failure-mode.description: Pain-point categorization by LLM is inconsistent across runs; use a fixed taxonomy and ask the agent to classify, not generate categories.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without a fixed taxonomy, the same pain gets labeled differently across runs, breaking aggregation.

failure-mode.description: Niche viability scoring requires the agent to have explicit market size data; without it, the agent will anchor on vague impressions and produce unreliable scores.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLMs amplify uncertain inputs into false confidence; explicit data grounds the analysis.
